message:
✨ ACP streaming integration + watcher deduplication (#26)

- Wire acpManager into server: WS input and REST send try ACP first, fall back to PTY
- Broadcast streaming chunks as 'stream' WS messages for real-time typing
- Finalize streaming message on 'turn_complete' with stable ID
- Deduplicate: skip watcher broadcasts for sessions with active ACP connections
- Add 'stream', 'tool', 'turn_complete' WS message types (server + web)
- Web accumulates stream chunks into live-updating copilot message bubble

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
